column3: Verify end-to-end functionality of the "Data Ingestion & Validation" page including valid CSV/XLSX file upload, file processing, successful ingestion, status updates, page refresh, schema validation, and workflow execution.
Verify the "Data Ingestion & Validation" page loads successfully and displays tenant-specific Data Contracts.
Verify "Source Type" filter options on the "Data Ingestion & Validation" page are displayed correctly and records are filtered based on the selected Source Type.
Verify "Status" filter options on the "Data Ingestion & Validation" page are displayed correctly and records are filtered based on the selected Status.
Verify the "+ Data Ingestion" button is visible on the "Data Ingestion & Validation" page, is clickable, and successfully navigates the user to the "Data Ingestion" form.
Verify the "Edit Status" functionality on the "Data Ingestion & Validation" page updates the record status successfully and reflects the latest status in the listing page.
Verify the "View Details" functionality on the "Data Ingestion & Validation" page opens the selected ingestion record and displays all associated details correctly.
Verify header & footer pagination controls function correctly on the "Data Ingestion & Validation" page and allow navigation across multiple pages of records.
Verify the "Download Schema" functionality on the "+ Data Ingestion" form downloads the correct schema file successfully for the selected Data Contract.
